name: Datacentrex, Inc.
business: Datacentrex, Inc. is a digital infrastructure and capital deployment company that owns and operates Scrypt-based proof-of-work compute assets. It generates revenue by deploying owned Scrypt ASIC hardware to produce hashrate and monetizing it primarily through a hashrate marketplace model, with settlement typically denominated in Bitcoin. Its operations contribute hashrate to the Litecoin blockchain and, through merged mining, simultaneously secure additional Scrypt-based networks including Dogecoin.

exposures.sentence: Our current operating platform is centered on owned and operated Scrypt-based proof-of-work (PoW) compute deployed through third-party colocation facilities.

Through merged-mining architecture, that same hashrate can simultaneously secure and validate additional Scrypt-based networks, including Dogecoin and other auxiliary Scrypt chains, without incremental energy consumption.
We primarily monetize our Scrypt compute through a hashrate marketplace model.
Settlement under the hashrate marketplace model is typically denominated in Bitcoin.
We deploy our mining equipment primarily through third-party colocation and hosting arrangements.
We may be exposed to cybersecurity threats and breaches.

The rapid growth in demand for data center capacity driven by artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing (HPC) workloads has intensified competition for power infrastructure across the United States.
